note: Balancer V3 CompositeLiquidityRouter v2 user surface. Covered: ERC4626/boosted proportional & unbalanced add + proportional remove (baked pool->tokens map, reuses balancer_v3_zip_pool_tokens) + permitBatchAndCall. Nested-pool variants + multicall deferred (lower/no recent tx). Source: balancer-deployments v3.
